title: Codebase Overview
description: Architectural overview document generated from source code analysis

boulders.name: Module Inventory
boulders.description: A table of all source modules with their purpose and key exports

stack.instruction: For each file, identify: module name, primary purpose (one sentence), and key exported functions/classes

criteria.description: Table listing every module with its purpose and exports

boulders.name: Architecture Summary
boulders.description: High-level description of how the modules fit together, including data flow and key abstractions

stack.instruction: Identify imports between modules and the primary data flow through the system

criteria.description: Describes the data flow between at least 3 modules with clear directionality
